knowledge_hooks.hook: Use The Wine Company when the prospect has flexi-work and OT leakage; attendance visibility protects both planning and payroll.
knowledge_hooks.pain: Flexi-work shifts, lateness, Excel rosters, overtime, and payroll reports were difficult to track manually.
knowledge_hooks.outcome: StaffAny improved punctuality visibility, OT tracking, reporting, and payroll processing in a few clicks.
knowledge_hooks.best_fit_prospect_pattern: SG F&B/bar/bistro teams with flexi-work, lateness, overtime, payroll, and Excel rostering pain.
